title: DC34 22.2V 4500mAh Replacement Battery for Dyson DC34 DC31 DC35 Type B, DC44 Animal DC45, DC31 Animal, DC34 DC35 Animal DC35 Exclusive Cordless Vacuum Cleaner Battery
features: Product Details: 22.2V 4500mAh Lithium-ion battery without memory effects, you don't need to worry about the battery damaging the machine. The battery is based on the original size and the function is the same as the original battery.
Applicable Models: Compatible with Dyson 22.2V DC31, DC35 Type B, DC44 Animal, DC45, DC31, DC31 Animal, DC34, DC35, DC35 Animal, DC35 Exclusive (Only for Type B Screw Fitting, Not for Type A)

Easy to install and safe charging: Easy to install and it fits perfectly. Cleans all dog hair and anything on the floor; Built-in charge indicator: constant blue means charging, light off means charging is complete. Flashing yellow means that an error has occurred.
Professional Testing: With CE and RoHS certification, tested by manufacturer to match and exceed specifications of OEM products.
After-Sales Service: Come with 24-hour friendly customer service. If there is any problem with the use of the battery, please feel free to contact us.
description: Brand: For Dyson Chemistry: Li-ion Model No.: DC34 Condition: Brand new Sub-Type: Replacement Battery Capacity: 4500mAh/4.5Ah Voltage (V): 22.2V Energy：99.9Wh Item Weight: 418g Fit Machine Model: Dyson DC31,DC35 type B, DC44 Animal,DC45, DC31, DC31 Animal, DC34, DC35, DC35 Animal, DC35 Exclusive Compatible with: 917083-01, 17083-2811, 18172-01-04, 17083-4211 17083-04 Notes: This is the Type B screw in battery and will NOT work with the Motor that takes the Snap in style battery. Please make sure you have the Screw in type B battery and motor combo. Also Fits DC34 & DC35 Vacuum as an upgrade from the 1300mah with Screw in battery ONLY. Will NOT work with the snap in type battery. This is the Type-B Screw in Battery
